title: HELM — Project Promise
summary: Public commitment documenting HELM v0.1 user-visible features, non-goals, and development history through v1.
notes: Manifest declared PRD with precedence 1. Document serves as public project commitment with versioned feature roadmap. Contains development history (v0.1–v1) with feature descriptions but also includes conflict markers from git merge, which does not affect classification. Features listed are user-visible requirements and acceptance criteria.
